content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Circular RMQ". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/52/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers. The third line contains an integer q, the number of queries. Each of the next q lines contains two space-separated integers, the start and end indices of the query range.
content.outputFormat: For each query, output the minimum value in the specified range.

solution.approach: Use a segment tree to store the minimum values of subarrays and handle circular queries by considering two cases: when the query range is within the array and when it wraps around the end of the array.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) for building the segment tree and O(log n) for each query
